description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two rectangular wooden speaker cabinets and a compact black control unit. The speakers feature a rich wood grain finish, with one speaker showing a circular tweeter above a larger woofer, both set into a black front panel. The rear of the speakers reveals connection terminals and a label, with visible red and black speaker wires attached. The control unit is box-shaped, finished in matte black, and includes a large rotary knob, several buttons, and multiple wired connections for audio input and output. The overall design is modern yet classic, suitable for home or small studio environments, and the materials suggest a combination of wood, plastic, and metal. The system is compact enough to be placed on a shelf or desk, and the visible wiring indicates it is intended for wired audio connections.
description: A compact stereo sound system with two wood-finished speakers and a black control unit featuring a rotary knob and wired connections. The speakers have visible drivers and connection terminals, blending modern and classic design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both speakers with visible drivers and the control unit with its rotary knob and connected wires.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the wood grain of the speakers and the back of the control unit with multiple cables attached.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the speaker terminals, label, and the back of the control unit with all wired connections visible.
description_view_3: Back and top view focusing on the wood finish of the speakers and the routing of the connecting wires.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control unit features a large central rotary knob, several small round buttons, and multiple ports on the front and side panels. The layout is simple and functional, with controls grouped for easy access.
